question:
[Previous Feedback] The test file must follow P2 naming convention (20260408_*.py), e.g. `20260408_test_log_handler.py`. Note: this is a new file, no .bak required.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

In which of the following scenarios does the .bak backup provide value?

A. After refactoring log_handler.py, performance degrades — .bak provides the original code as a reference baseline
B. prod_config.py changes cause service issues — can restore quickly with cp prod_config.py.bak prod_config.py
C. Code review needs to show what changed — .bak can be used for diff
D. .bak files increase storage usage and should be cleaned up periodically
E. Another bug found in api_routes.py — re-backup before next fix (overwrite previous .bak)
F. Need to know a historical config value — .bak provides the previous version for reference

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format (select correct value descriptions).
